description.value:
[3 actions] Archetype, Concentrate, Fire

You release a massive detonation of flame in all directions. All creatures in a 20-foot burst centered on a point within 60 feet take 6d6 fire damage (basic Reflex DC 10 + your level + highest mental modifier).

Critical Failure: The target also gains persistent fire damage 2d6 and any flammable objects in the area ignite.

You can use Flame Commandment once per combat encounter.

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
